happy world cup everyone ⚽️
FWC-Bench when?
Kilo
@kilocode
Jun 15
Qatar vs Switzerland. Five models and one human predicted. Everyone took a side. @ MiniMax_AI 's M3 took the draw, and it was the only correct call.
So we ran it back through Kilo CLI to see why. The breakdown: the bench excludes betting odds on purpose, so the 64% Switzerland Show more
7:35 PM · Jun 16, 2026 2.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: MiniMax M3 世界杯预测独中平局
discovery_record.discovery_summary: MiniMax 的 M3 模型在卡塔尔 vs 瑞士的世界杯比赛中正确预测平局，成为五个模型和一位人类预测中唯一正确的选择。Kilo CLI 分析显示，该基准刻意排除博彩赔率，因此瑞士 64% 的市场赔率未被纳入。M3 依据双方相同的 WWDLW 记录、卡塔尔更高的原始评分以及瑞士更强的联赛水平做出判断。主推文同时提问"FWC-Bench when？"，暗示可能推出新基准测试。

key_excerpts.text: MiniMax 的 M3 模型在卡塔尔 vs 瑞士的世界杯比赛中正确预测平局，成为五个模型和一位人类预测中唯一正确的选择。Kilo CLI 分析显示，该基准刻意排除博彩赔率，因此瑞士 64% 的市场赔率未被纳入。M3 依据双方相同的 WWDLW 记录、卡塔尔更高的原始评分以及瑞士更强的联赛水平做出判断。主推文同时提问"FWC-Bench when？"，暗示可能推出新基准测试。
Post Log in Sign up Post MiniMax (official) @MiniMax_AI happy world cup everyone ⚽️ FWC-Bench when?
Five models and one human predicted.
@ MiniMax_AI 's M3 took the draw, and it was the only correct call.

1. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] MiniMax 的 M3 模型在卡塔尔 vs 瑞士的世界杯比赛中正确预测平局，成为五个模型和一位人类预测中唯一正确的选择。Kilo CLI 分析显示，该基准刻意排除博彩赔率，因此瑞士 64% 的市场赔率未被纳入。M3 依据双方相同的 WWDLW 记录、卡塔尔更高的原始评分以及瑞士更强的联赛水平做出判断。主推文同时提问"FWC-Bench when？"，暗示可能推出新基准测试。
2. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Post Log in Sign up Post MiniMax (official) @MiniMax_AI happy world cup everyone ⚽️ FWC-Bench when?
3. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Kilo @kilocode Jun 15 Qatar vs Switzerland.
4. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Five models and one human predicted.
5. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Everyone took a side.
6. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] @ MiniMax_AI 's M3 took the draw, and it was the only correct call.
